title: Status JSON schema guide
intro: Use this guide when CI, scripts, or external tooling need the machine-readable project-status document.
notes: `status` and `overview` reuse the same ProjectStatus wire shape.
`staged` and `live` emit the same top-level envelope; they differ only in how the fields are populated.
Branch on kind plus schemaVersion before reading nested fields.

title: Status staged JSON schema
notes: This is the same shared contract used by live status.
Branch on kind plus schemaVersion before reading nested fields.

title: Status live JSON schema
notes: This is the same shared contract used by staged status.
Branch on kind plus schemaVersion before reading nested fields.
